Name: 「Life-Risking Arrow」
Desc: Obtained by unlocking Soldier 11's Mindscape Cinema "Scorching Flow"
Desc2:
A card with Soldier 11's face printed on it.
"My loyalty belongs to the Defense Force... but I'll take your kindness."
"As comrades, we'll always have each other's back, but as friends, I'm willing to trust you with my life."
